reviews.review_description: As someone who has played some of the owners previous work, I know that this game is much better than anything he has made, the graphics and lighting is great, especially the textures, the models used are great, and fits a style that pleases the eye, each monster is perfectly creepy and funny in its own way, “Tickle Tipson” As the game calls him has a hilarious face, but chases you at top speeds, Joe, Level 2, is horrifying with its needle as a hand, and gouged out mouth, Level 3’s monster, which I helped develop is creepy with its teeth and unique design, overall this is a great game with a great story, great design, and great owner. Yours Truly, Hamstertendo
yeah this game is so good i totally am not the owner and im not self glazing hahahahaha
The Lobby OST Is Fire! And I’m Excited For What’s To Come.
